mapper.select: SELECT L.LODGE_ID AS lodgeId, L.LODGE_NAME AS lodgeName, L.ADDR AS addr, L.LAT AS lat, L.LNG AS lng, L.FACILITIES AS facilities, NVL(R.MIN_PRICE, 0) AS minPrice, NVL(R.ROOM_CNT, 0) AS roomCount, (SELECT F.FILE_URL FROM TB_FILE F WHERE F.REF_TYPE = 'LODGE' AND F.REF_ID = L.LODGE_ID AND ROWNUM = 1 ) AS THUMB_PATH FROM TB_LODGE L LEFT JOIN ( SELECT LODGE_ID, MIN(PRICE_PER_NIGHT) AS MIN_PRICE, COUNT(*) AS ROOM_CNT FROM TB_LODGE_ROOM WHERE STATUS_CD = 'APPROVE' GROUP BY LODGE_ID ) R ON L.LODGE_ID = R.LODGE_ID WHERE L.STATUS_CD = 'APPROVE' ORDER BY L.LODGE_ID

SELECT LODGE_ID AS lodgeId, BIZ_NO AS bizNo, LODGE_NAME AS lodgeName, ADDR AS addr, LAT AS lat, LNG AS lng, PET_POLICY AS petPolicy, REFUND_POLICY AS refundPolicy, FACILITIES AS facilities, STATUS_CD AS statusCd, CHECK_IN AS checkIn, CHECK_OUT AS checkOut, DESCRIPTION AS description, PET_FEE AS petFee FROM TB_LODGE WHERE LODGE_ID = #{lodgeId}

SELECT ROOM_ID AS roomId, LODGE_ID AS lodgeId, ROOM_NAME AS roomName, PRICE_PER_NIGHT AS pricePerNight, CAPACITY AS capacity, PET_LIMIT AS petLimit, STATUS_CD AS statusCd FROM TB_LODGE_ROOM WHERE LODGE_ID = #{lodgeId} AND STATUS_CD = 'APPROVE' ORDER BY PRICE_PER_NIGHT
